message:
bd-102: implement flush operation ordering and batching

Add flush module for executing pending database operations:

PendingOp enum:
- Insert: tracks table, columns, values
- Update: tracks changed columns only (partial updates)
- Delete: tracks PK for deletion

FlushOrderer:
- Builds dependency graph from model FK relationships
- Orders inserts parent-first (fewer deps = insert first)
- Orders deletes child-first (more deps = delete first)

FlushPlan:
- Groups operations by type and table
- Batches INSERTs with multi-row VALUES clause
- Batches DELETEs with IN clause (single PK)
- Executes UPDATEs individually (different dirty columns)

FlushResult:
- Tracks inserted/updated/deleted counts
- Provides total() accessor

Features:
- Respects FK constraints via topological sort
- Efficient batching reduces round-trips
- Handles composite primary keys
- Comprehensive tracing at info/debug levels
- 12 unit tests covering ordering and batching

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
